questions.q: What type of records is Tiger Woods fighting a subpoena for, according to news breaking on April 16, 2026?
MLB and the Minnesota Twins launched an investigation in mid-April 2026 over an allegation from Boston Red Sox outfielder Jarren Duran that a fan told him to do what?
options: Fight him in the parking lot

questions.q: Speaking at a forum on April 15, 2026, FIFA president Gianni Infantino confirmed that which country's national team will 'for sure' participate in the World Cup despite an ongoing war?
Former Arsenal and Austria goalkeeper Alex Manninger tragically passed away at age 48 on April 16, 2026, due to what cause?
During the Jackie Robinson Day festivities on April 15, 2026, a pre-game singer collapsed before a matchup between which two MLB teams?
options: Tampa Bay Rays and Chicago White Sox
Los Angeles Dodgers and San Diego Padres
New York Yankees and Boston Red Sox
Atlanta Braves and New York Mets
questions.correctText: Tampa Bay Rays and Chicago White Sox
